name: fp-app
description: Future Planning POC – Monorepo (Web-App + Engines + Verträge + Stammdaten)

scripts.api: uv --project services/engines run fastapi dev services/engines/src/fp_engines/api.py
scripts.lint: pnpm -r lint && uv --project services/engines run ruff check services/engines
scripts.format: pnpm -r format && uv --project services/engines run ruff format services/engines
scripts.typecheck: pnpm -r typecheck && uv --project services/engines run mypy services/engines/src
scripts.test: pnpm -r test && uv --project services/engines run pytest services/engines
scripts.codegen: pnpm --filter @fp/shared codegen && uv --project services/engines run python services/engines/scripts/codegen.py
